name: Springs Global Participacoes S.A.
summary: Springs Global Participa√É¬ß√É¬µes S.A., through its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells home textile products primarily in Brazil, the United States, and Argentina. It operates through two segments, Wholesale and Retail. The company offers bedding, tabletop, and bath products comprising bed sheets and pillowcases, tablecloths, towels, rugs, and bath accessories; utility bedding products, such as pillows, mattress pads, comforters, and bedspreads; and intermediate products, including yarns and fabrics. It offers its products under the Casa Moys√É¬©s, MMartan, Artex, Santista, Arco-√É¬çris, Fantasia, Palette, Pal√É¬°dio, Calfat, Garcia, and Magicolor brand names. The company sells its products to department stores, mass retailers, and small and medium sized shops, as well as through an e-commerce platform. It operates 229 stores, including 61 owned and 168 franchised stores. The company was incorporated in 2005 and is headqaurtered in Montes Claros, Brazil. Springs Global Participa√É¬ß√É¬µes S.A. is a subsidiary of Companhia de Tecidos Norte de Minas.
